MNY Photo
Work

Weddings — editorial coverage with quiet confidence

A cinematic blend of documentary moments and refined portraiture — crafted for galleries that feel timeless, not trendy.

  • Best for: couples who value story + style
  • Session includes: timeline guidance, calm direction, curated edits
  • Deliverables: full gallery + highlight set
Explore Services Check Availability

Branding — images built to sell with restraint

On-brand visuals for founders and teams — clean, warm, and high-end. Art direction included.

  • Best for: founders, creative studios, service brands
  • Session includes: shotlist, styling guidance, location planning
  • Deliverables: web-ready set + socials crop kit
See Packages Start a Brief

Events — fast, flattering, unobtrusive

Conference, gala, and brand event coverage with a polished, editorial finish — delivered on schedule.

  • Best for: brand activations, press moments, team culture
  • Session includes: hero shots, candid moments, detail coverage
  • Deliverables: curated gallery + selects for PR
How It Works Request Coverage

Studio portraits — sculpted light, clean direction

A refined studio look with warm highlights and smooth shadows — perfect for headshots and editorial portraits.

  • Best for: executives, creatives, actors
  • Session includes: guided posing + styling notes
  • Deliverables: selects + retouched finals
Studio Options Book a Session

Family + lifestyle — honest, elevated, unrushed

Simple prompts, natural movement, beautiful light — made for homes, not hard drives.

  • Best for: families, couples, milestones
  • Session includes: wardrobe guidance + location scouting
  • Deliverables: curated gallery + print-ready files
Session Guide Request Dates

Commercial — campaign-ready details

Product, food, and lifestyle images designed for performance — sharp, warm, and intentional.

  • Best for: product launches and seasonal campaigns
  • Session includes: art direction + usage planning
  • Deliverables: hero set + variants for ads
Commercial Packages Request a Quote

A calm presence with a cinematic eye

MNY Photo is built for clients who want images that feel like they belong in print — warm, intentional, and quietly bold.

  • Refined direction, never forced
  • A timeline-friendly process
  • Consistent color + black & white
Meet MNY Photo View Work

Values that show up in every frame

Details matter. Energy matters. The work should feel effortless — and still be exceptionally made.

  • Warmth over trends
  • Comfort + clarity on set
  • Finish that feels expensive
Our Values Work Together

A client experience built for ease

From the first email to final delivery: clear steps, fast communication, and calm guidance — so you can be present.

  • Pre-session planning + styling notes
  • Gentle direction and natural movement prompts
  • Delivery designed for sharing + printing

Premium photography, quietly bold.

Images that feel like print — warm, cinematic, and effortlessly elevated.

MNY Photo creates a refined visual library for modern brands and once-in-a-lifetime days. We blend documentary honesty with editorial polish — so you look like yourself, at your best.

What we do

Six ways we create images that sell — and stories that last.

Editorial coverage with documentary honesty and calm direction.

Founder sessions and team libraries designed to convert.

Studio Portraits

Family + Lifestyle

Warm, natural sessions designed for printing and sharing.

Commercial

Product and campaign imagery with art direction included.

Details

Process

Five steps. Zero chaos.

  1. 01Inquire + clarity call — we align on goals, location, and timing.
  2. 02Planning — shotlist, wardrobe, and light-first scheduling.
  3. 03Shoot day — calm direction, clean framing, and real moments.
  4. 04Edit — warm tones, premium black & white, consistent finish.
  5. 05Deliver — curated gallery, fast sharing, print-ready files.

Signature style

Four pillars that make it feel expensive.

Warm contrast

Golden highlights, deep blacks, and skin tones that look real.

Editorial framing

Clean lines, negative space, and a quiet sense of intention.

Calm direction

You’ll never wonder what to do with your hands.

A finished gallery

Not just highlights — a consistent story from start to end.

Who we are

Cinematic photography — designed to feel like you.

MNY Photo is a boutique studio approach: fewer sessions, more intention. Our clients come for the look — and stay for the calm, guided experience.

Client-rated experience

Guided direction (always)

Client notes

Three reviews that say it better than we can.

“We looked like ourselves — just elevated. The direction was calm, and the gallery felt like a magazine story.”

— Ava + Theo

“Our brand library finally feels cohesive. The shotlist and planning made everything efficient and on-brand.”

— Mara, Creative Director

“Fast delivery, gorgeous color, and details we didn’t even know we wanted. Truly premium.”

— Noah + Lin

Booking

Investment that matches the finish.

We take on a limited number of sessions each month to protect quality and turnaround times. Share your date, location, and goals — we’ll respond with availability and next steps.

Send an inquiry Read planning guides

FAQ

Answers, without the fluff.

Do you help with posing?

Yes — you’ll get calm direction and natural prompts. The goal is to look like yourself, not a performance.

How many photos do we receive?

It depends on session type and duration. You’ll receive a curated, story-complete gallery plus a highlight set for fast sharing.

What’s your editing style?

Warm, cinematic color with clean contrast, paired with a classic black & white set. Skin tones stay true and natural.

Do you travel?

Yes. We photograph across NYC and beyond. For destination sessions, we’ll provide transparent travel planning and fees.

How do we book?

Send an inquiry with your date and goals. If we’re a fit, we’ll confirm details and reserve your date with an agreement and retainer.
